synopsis:
News, exclusive fiction, and more!

**The Force of Sport!** Former wrestler Arda Ocal explores the ties between Star Wars and the world of sports.

**Combat Ready or Clankers?** Historian Dr. Chris Kempshall discovers just how effective the Trade Federation's battle droids really were.

**Exclusive Star Wars: The High Republic Fiction:** The epic finale of Tales from the Occlusion Zone!
title: Insider #232
